features.title: Agentic-mode dispatch loop
features.description: Multi-turn dispatch loop in executeAgent realizing MODE-002 per DEC-0004 + DEC-0008 + DEC-0010. Declared tools[] (clamped per DEC-0047) become the LLM's tool registry; LLM emits tool calls; framework dispatches each through ExtensionContext; threads results into message history; loop terminates on end_turn / max-turns / tool-failure. Returns final assistant message. Closes FGAP-169 + FGAP-178 + (via formal demo) FGAP-102.
acceptance_criteria: executeAgent in agentic-mode dispatches a multi-turn loop wiring compiled.tools to LLM tool registry
Each LLM-emitted tool call dispatches through ExtensionContext per DEC-0010 (tool-agnostic; no jit-agents imports tool implementations)
Loop terminates correctly on end_turn / max-turns / tool-failure
Capability grant per DEC-0047 clamps the LLM tool registry to parent_grant ∩ declared tools[]
Final assistant message returned as TypedResult with usage metadata
Integration test exercises full loop with a real tool (e.g. read-file) end-to-end

features.title: Dispatch-model discovery tool surface
features.description: list-dispatch-models / discover-agent-models Pi tool querying ExtensionContext's model registry returning {provider, modelId, contextWindow, capabilities}. scripts/orchestrator/list-dispatch-models.ts CLI dual-surface per DEC-0019/0020. Closes FB-007 (FGAP-158).
acceptance_criteria: Pi tool list-dispatch-models registered in pi-agent-dispatch (or pi-jit-agents per DEC scope)
Returns structured list of valid provider/modelId combinations sourced from ExtensionContext
Companion scripts/orchestrator/list-dispatch-models.ts CLI dual-surface
Orchestrator can resolve model strings without trial-and-error

features.title: call-agent structured-return surface
features.description: call-agent returns agent output as structured content (parsed JSON if outputSchema, text otherwise) + usage + model + duration in AgentToolResult.content, NOT buried in details metadata. Orchestrators consume output without session-log inspection. Closes FB-009 (FGAP-160).
acceptance_criteria: AgentToolResult.content carries the agent output verbatim, parsed if outputSchema set
Usage / model / duration accessible on the result without manual log inspection
Zero-token-output detection per FB-015 (FGAP-165) — throw AgentDispatchError with stopReason + model on zero-token dispatches
Workflow chaining (output of agent A → input of agent B) works without out-of-band log read

features.title: Agent introspection + dispatch-history surface
features.description: Pi tools agent-trace + inspect-agent + query-agent-dispatch — orchestrator can query dispatch history (per-agent or session-wide) with input / output / usage / model / stopReason / duration, plus inspect any single agent's full spec + last-dispatch state + cumulative usage. Closes FB-016 (FGAP-166).
acceptance_criteria: agent-trace Pi tool returns last N dispatches for an agent
inspect-agent Pi tool returns full spec + health snapshot
query-agent-dispatch Pi tool scans .pi/agent/sessions/ JSONL filtered + paginated
All three surface in pi-agent-dispatch with companion scripts/orchestrator/ CLI dual-surfaces

features.title: author-agent-spec correctness arc
features.description: Fixes to author-agent-spec eliminating the FB-001..006 friction cluster: resolvePromptField heuristic narrowed to .md/.txt-extension-only template detection; YAML serializer preserves newlines (no folded block scalar); round-trip validation surfaces semantic errors (template path doesn't resolve / schema not registered / model not in registry); explicit inline-vs-template discriminator in AgentSpec shape. Closes FB-001/002/003/004/005/006 (FGAPs 153/154/155/156/157/158).
acceptance_criteria: resolvePromptField only classifies as template when value ends with .md or .txt extension
YAML serializer uses literal block scalar for multi-line prompts (preserves newlines)
Round-trip validation surfaces template-path resolution failure before disk write
AgentSpec shape enforces oneOf inline/template per prompt slot (no parallel optional ambiguity)
author-agent-spec invokes list-dispatch-models to validate model field at write time (FB-005)
